phrases.intent_en: Ask where the automatic luggage lockers are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os armários automáticos para bagagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH uh-ruh-MAH-reeoosh ow-too-MAH-tee-koosh PUH-ruh buh-GAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Automated luggage storage in Portuguese stations is typically positioned near main exits for quick passenger access.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a consigna de bagagens.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koong-SEEG-nuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the luggage storage.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the luggage storage.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koong-SEEG-nuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a consigna de bagagens.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Espera da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh DUH seh-PEH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Espera da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh DUH seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sala de Espera da CP.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Hall Central Art Déco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Hall Central Art Déco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Art Deco Main Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Art Deco Main Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Hall Central Art Déco.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o hall central Art Déco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Hall Central Art Déco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Art Déco Central Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Art Déco Central Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Hall Central Art Déco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: CP waiting areas are traditionally located near ticketing facilities for passenger convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no átrio, junto às máquinas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHTR-yoo, ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the atrium, next to the machines.

responses.english: Good morning, in the atrium, next to the machines.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHTR-yoo, ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no átrio, junto às máquinas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the automatic luggage lockers are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as caixas de consigna automática?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH KEYE-shuhsh DIH koong-SEEG-nuh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The luggage lockers are located in the Art Deco Central Hall, a stable and well-known area of the station.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the Central Hall.

responses.english: Good morning, in the Central Hall.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find platforms 1 to 6
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh OOM AH SAYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms 1 to 6 are clearly signposted throughout the station; no specific micro-navigation is needed.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Hall Central Art Déco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL AH-ruht DEH-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Hall Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Central Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Central Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Hall Central.
